songs.title: Never Looking Back
songs.credits: Lyrics: Yoshie Isogai\nMusic: Takao Yanagawa\nArrangement: Shuhei Mutsuki
songs.description: Our rivalry is what brought us together... And now there's no stopping us! Never looking back!

songs.title: NEXT FRONTIER
songs.credits: Lyrics: Uran\nMusic / Arrangement: Akihiko Yamaguchi
songs.description: Only those who keep their eyes on the prize will reach the NEXT FRONTIER. The crown awaits...

songs.title: Grow Up and Shine!
songs.credits: Lyrics: Erica Masaki\nMusic: Satoru Kuwabara (Arte Refact)\nArrangement: Takuya Sakai (Arte Refact)
songs.description: Whether we're racing or just running for the fun of it, we give the track everything we've got! We gathered up all the unique dreams we have, and put them into this song, so let's go! Starting gate!

songs.title: Winning the Soul
songs.credits: Lyrics / Music / Arrangement: Makoto Miyazaki
songs.description: A song those who wear the Classic Triple Crown can sing. Performing this is every racer's dream.

songs.title: Run for Our Dream!
songs.credits: Lyrics: Mike Sugiyama\nMusic / Arrangement: Kenta Higashiohji
songs.description: A refreshing song performed with a rival. Placing your dreams in another, a new story begins...

songs.title: Hoppity Sunny Days♪
songs.credits: Lyrics: corochi (Cygames)\nMusic / Arrangement: Tetsuya Uchida (Cygames)
songs.description: The life of a racer is full of ups and downs, smiles and frowns... so we squeezed all the big, wacky adventures of Tracen life into one itty-bitty song! ♪

songs.title: Transforming
songs.credits: Lyrics: Yuriko Mori\nMusic / Arrangement: Hidekazu Tanaka (MONACA)
songs.description: What lies beyond the goal? What unique scenery is there to see there? This song blends wonder and warmth, gently encouraging you to keep on running.

songs.title: We are DREAMERS!!
songs.credits: Lyrics: Aiko Takase\nMusic: Yusuke Onodera\nArrangement: Satoshi Setsune, Yusuke Onodera
songs.description: Our first anniversary... We really poured all our gratitude into this song. It's about reaching our dreams, and finding new inspirations beyond them. We'll keep running with you, further and further!

songs.title: Precious Smiles (Beyond the Future!)
songs.credits: Lyrics: Fubito Endo\nMusic / Arrangement: Keita Miyoshi
songs.description: Dreams come to those who run on! An ode to the radiance of youth and all the tears and smiles it brings.

songs.title: Umapyoi Legend
songs.credits: Lyrics / Music / Arrangement: Akihiro Honda (Cygames)
songs.description: A high-energy song perfect for the URA Finals. Let me hear you shout! Umapyoi! ♪ Umapyoi! ♪

songs.title: Make Debut!
songs.credits: Lyrics: Shun Aratame\nMusic: Shun Aratame\nArrangement: Shun Aratame, Yuya Hirosawa
songs.description: The first song sung by Umamusume after their debut. Echo forth! Fanfare!

songs.title: Ms. Victoria
songs.credits: Lyrics: Erica Masaki\nMusic / Arrangement: Shota Horie
songs.description: A passionate song celebrating the racer's hard-earned victory. May her cries be forever etched into history.

-Spe

songs.title: Umapyoi Legend
songs.credits: Lyrics / Music / Arrangement: Akihiro Honda (Cygames)
songs.description: A high-energy song perfect for the URA Finals. Let me hear you shout! Umapyoi! ♪ Umapyoi! ♪

songs.title: Make Debut!
songs.credits: Lyrics: Shun Aratame\nMusic: Shun Aratame\nArrangement: Shun Aratame, Yuya Hirosawa
songs.description: The first song sung by Umamusume after their debut. Echo forth! Fanfare!

songs.title: Ms. Victoria
songs.credits: Lyrics: Erica Masaki\nMusic / Arrangement: Shota Horie
songs.description: A passionate song celebrating the racer's hard-earned victory. May her cries be forever etched into history.

valentineGifts.messageMaleTrainer:
I hope this note finds you well. As thanks
for your guidance, I have prepared this
gift. Though I lack skill, I hope the memory
of this treat sticks with you forever more.
